system.unidentifiedDesc: An odd ring that seems to fit any finger perfectly.
system.description: The wearer of this ring may command [[/r 1d6]] normal animals (or one giant-sized). The animals are not allowed a saving throw to resist control. The ring will not control intelligent animal species or fantastical or magical monsters. The wearer must be able to see the animals to control them. The control will last as long as the wearer concentrates on the animals and does not move or fight. When the wearer stops concentrating, the animals will be free to attack their controller or run away (roll reactions with a penalty of −1 to the roll). This ring can only be used once per turn.
